action.reasoning: Observation: Best eval mean_r2=0.5206 (iter 4, no q_weight), but q_weight=2.0 training (iter 12) made things worse - upper-level ptend_q features went from R²=-0.7 to -693 to -6176, and even unmasked ptend_q features degraded. The feature weighting caused the model to focus on inherently unpredictable features at the expense of predictable ones. Analysis: The winning formula was: 1024/8 architecture, no feature weighting, proper zero_mask. I need to go back to this and train longer. Decision: Retrain with q_weight=1.0 (equal weighting), same architecture, 35 epochs for better convergence, then apply zero_mask with threshold=0.0 and submit eval.
